nodes.label: AI Sprite & Game Asset Tool
nodes.rationale: Locally-run web app that turns a text prompt and optional reference image into a clean, engine-ready animated sprite sheet.

nodes.label: Vertex AI Service Account Auth
nodes.rationale: Authenticates to Gemini through Vertex AI / Google Agent Platform using a service-account JSON key — not a GEMINI_API_KEY.

nodes.label: Gemini Global Endpoint
nodes.rationale: Gemini 3.x image models are served from the global endpoint; a regional endpoint returns 404 model not found.

nodes.label: Deterministic Python Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Background removal, pixel-art quantization, sprite-sheet packing, and atlas metadata are handled deterministically in Python while Gemini does generative work.

nodes.label: Live Smoke Test Script
nodes.rationale: Manual-only real Gemini calls kept out of pytest to confirm live model IDs and SDK signatures.

nodes.label: Sprite Game Asset Tool Design Spec
nodes.norm_label: sprite game asset tool design spec

nodes.label: Two-Tier Local Architecture
nodes.rationale: Hard line between AI layer (non-deterministic Gemini) and pipeline layer (deterministic pure Python). Pipeline never calls Gemini; only transforms images.

nodes.label: Pipeline Layer
nodes.rationale: Pure Image→Image functions testable with fixed input PNGs; no network, no I/O, no config reads.

nodes.label: Gemini Client Isolation
nodes.rationale: gemini_client.py is the only module importing the Gemini SDK so swapping AI provider later touches one file.

nodes.label: Stage 1 Static Sprite
nodes.rationale: Foundation milestone: describe → clean sprite → export; shippable on its own.

nodes.label: Stage 2 Animation
nodes.rationale: Motion is the moat; static alone is too small. Animated sprite → sheet + atlas with regenerate cleanup.

nodes.label: Base-Anchored Editing
nodes.rationale: Every frame passes the original base sprite plus a per-frame prompt; anchoring to one reference each call beats chaining frame→frame which drifts.

nodes.label: Shared Bounding Box Alignment
nodes.rationale: One bounding box covering every frame so the character does not jitter or resize between frames; deterministic and testable.

nodes.label: Regenerate-Per-Frame Escape Hatch
nodes.rationale: FrameStrip lets users delete and regenerate a single bad frame; pragmatic answer to Gemini not being frame-perfect.

nodes.label: Preset Action Library
nodes.rationale: Reliable core idle/walk/run; best-effort attack/jump. Adding a preset = adding table rows, no new code.

nodes.label: Filesystem Project Storage
nodes.rationale: Plain filesystem, no database; each project is ./projects/<uuid>/ with project.json manifest.

nodes.label: Deterministic vs Non-Deterministic Testing Split
nodes.rationale: Everything deterministic tested exhaustively and for free; the single non-deterministic seam is mocked in CI and smoke-tested by hand.

nodes.label: Configurable Gemini Model Selection
nodes.rationale: GEMINI_MODEL_EDIT must stay on full Flash Image because Lite is not optimized for multiple reference inputs; Stage 1 can optionally use Lite as a cost lever.

nodes.label: Python Imaging Stack Tradeoff
nodes.rationale: Two-language split means two dev servers vs all-JS Next.js, but Python Pillow/NumPy/rembg imaging ecosystem is worth it for a local personal tool.

nodes.label: Locked Guiding Decisions
nodes.rationale: Learning/personal tool; Gemini + local post-processing; animated sprite in 2 stages; pixel and hi-res; React+Vite and FastAPI; small preset library.

nodes.label: Sprite Game Asset Tool Implementation Plan
nodes.norm_label: sprite game asset tool implementation plan

nodes.label: TDD Implementation Approach
nodes.rationale: Deterministic pipeline tested exhaustively against committed fixtures; Gemini seam mocked in CI and smoke-tested by hand.

nodes.label: Pipeline Purity Convention
nodes.rationale: Every pipeline/* function is Image→Image or [Image]→Image with no network, disk, or config reads; primary test surface.

nodes.label: Seam Dependency Injection
nodes.rationale: rembg and Gemini SDK client are injected so tests substitute fakes.

nodes.label: google-genai SDK Call Shape
nodes.rationale: No Interactions API; both generation and editing use client.models.generate_content with response_modalities IMAGE, isolated to gemini_client.py.

nodes.label: Global Region Model Risk Resolution
nodes.rationale: gemini-3.1-flash-image 404s at us-central1; Gemini 3.x image models serve from global endpoint. Default region now global.

nodes.label: Partial Animation Failure Tolerance
nodes.rationale: One failed frame returns status failed with placeholder while other frames succeed; successful frames never lost.
